targets.boundary: Entire business, manufacturing supply chain, and product life cycle worldwide
targets.notes: Part of Apple’s 2030 climate roadmap to cut total greenhouse gas emissions by 75% from a 2015 baseline across scopes 1, 2, and 3 before neutralizing remaining emissions.
targets.title: 2030 75% GHG reduction vs 2015 (company-wide value chain)

targets.boundary: Entire business, manufacturing supply chain, and product life cycle worldwide
targets.notes: Apple aims to be carbon neutral across its entire business, manufacturing supply chain, and product life cycle by 2030, neutralizing residual emissions after underlying emissions reductions.
targets.title: 2030 carbon neutral across entire value chain
